Renamed compound->distill, compound-refresh->distill-refresh across all cross-references
Plugin installed and verified working across all repos
Old every-marketplace and compound-engineering cache cleaned up
notes: All initial setup tasks complete. Next work: test /proof on Portbase Portfolio Strategie Framework v0.51 in portfoliostrategyframework repo (80-page Dutch doc, ~180 findings expected). The antipatterns_to_avoid_bad_writing.md at repo root is the source doc — content lives in skills/proof/references/writing-style-{en,nl}.md.
